underlying_goal: Set up the Vercel agent-browser skill in user-scope Claude skills and create a verification workflow for UI changes using agent-browser as a subagent
friction_detail: Initial web fetch truncated the skill file content, requiring a fallback to raw GitHub URL via curl.
brief_summary: User wanted to pull the Vercel agent-browser skill into user-scope Claude skills and set up a UI verification workflow; Claude fetched the skill, installed it, and created both base and verification workflow skill files.
